mainEntity.name: How is Virtual CFO different from a CA firm doing accounts?

acceptedAnswer.text: A CA firm typically handles compliance — filing returns, preparing financial statements. A Virtual CFO provides strategic financial management — fundraising, cash flow planning, investor reporting, financial modelling, and board advisory. We combine both under one engagement.

mainEntity.name: Do you work with venture-funded startups in Bangalore?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. We serve multiple VC-funded startups in Bangalore. Our Virtual CFO service includes investor reporting, FEMA compliance for foreign investment rounds, ESOP administration, and due diligence support for subsequent funding rounds.

Standard engagement: monthly MIS delivery, fortnightly calls, quarterly in-person reviews. During fundraising or critical periods, interaction is typically weekly or as needed. Our MG Road office is available for walk-in meetings.
